message.emptyHint: Type a message below and press Enter to send

composer.hint: Enter to send · Shift + Enter for newline

dialog.description: Choose a user MaiBot already knows and chat as that user. MaiBot will respond using her memory and understanding of that user.
dialog.groupNameHint: MaiBot will treat this as a group chat with this name
dialog.title: New virtual identity chat

media.audioUnsupported: Your browser does not support audio playback
media.videoUnsupported: Your browser does not support video playback

toast.backendUnavailable: Cannot connect to the backend. Make sure MaiBot is running.
toast.currentSessionUnavailable: The current chat session is unavailable. Please try again later.
toast.imageLimitDesc: You can send up to {{count}} images at once.
toast.imageReadFailedDesc: Please choose another image and try again.
toast.selectPlatformAndUser: Please select a platform and user
toast.sessionUnavailable: Cannot open the chat session. Please try again later.

httpWarning.title: Security notice:
httpWarning.message: You are accessing WebUI over HTTP.
httpWarning.description: Non-local HTTP connections may expose access tokens and configuration data. Use HTTPS or a trusted private network when possible.

appearance.accentHint: Click the color ring or enter a HEX value
appearance.confirmResetThemeDesc: This will reset all theme settings to default, including colors, fonts, layout and custom CSS. This cannot be undone, are you sure?
appearance.cssWarningTitle: The following have been filtered for safety:
appearance.cssDescription: Write custom CSS to further personalize the interface. Dangerous CSS (like @import, url()) will be automatically filtered.
appearance.exportDesc: Export theme as a JSON file for sharing or backup; all settings will be applied automatically on import.
appearance.importSuccessDesc: Theme config imported, page will reload automatically
appearance.resetSuccessDesc: Theme has been reset to default
appearance.enableAnimationsDesc: Disabling this will turn off all transition animations and effects, improving performance
appearance.inheritParentBgDesc: When enabled, uses the background config from the parent layer

security.confirmRegenerateDesc: The old token will be invalidated after regeneration. You will need to log in again.
security.cannotCopyDesc: Token is stored in a secure Cookie. Please regenerate to get a new Token.
security.updateSuccessDesc: Access Token updated. Redirecting to login page.
security.generateSuccessDesc: New Access Token generated. Please save it immediately.
security.cannotViewDesc: Token is stored in a secure Cookie. Click "Regenerate" to get a new Token.
security.confirmRegenerateFullDesc: This will generate a new 64-character secure token, immediately invalidating the current Token. You will need to log in again with the new Token. This action cannot be undone. Are you sure?
security.tokenStorePlaceholder: Token is stored in a secure Cookie
security.safekeepTip: Keep your Access Token safe and do not share it with others.
security.tokenValid: Token format is valid and ready to use
security.dialogDesc: This is your new Token. Please save it immediately. You will be redirected to the login page after closing this window.
security.tip1: This Token is only shown once and cannot be viewed after closing
security.tip2: Copy and save it to a secure location immediately
security.tip3: You will be automatically redirected to the login page after closing
security.tip4: Use the new Token to log back in
security.securityTip1: Regenerating creates a new system-generated 64-character secure token
security.securityTip2: Custom Tokens must meet all security requirements
security.securityTip3: After updating, the old Token will be immediately invalidated
security.securityTip4: View and copy your Token only in a secure environment
security.securityTip5: If you suspect a Token leak, regenerate or update it immediately
security.securityTip6: System-generated Tokens are recommended for maximum security

other.enableAvatarFetchDesc: When disabled, chat and reasoning views stop requesting avatar images and use default avatars.
other.logCacheSizeDesc: Controls the maximum number of log entries cached. Larger values use more memory.
other.dataSyncIntervalDesc: Controls the auto-refresh interval for home page statistics
other.wsReconnectDesc: Base reconnect interval after log WebSocket disconnects
other.wsMaxReconnectDesc: Maximum reconnect attempts after connection failure
other.confirmClearCacheDesc: This will clear all locally cached settings and data (excluding login credentials). You may need to reconfigure some preferences. Are you sure?
other.importExportDesc: Export current interface settings for backup, or restore from a previously exported file.
other.confirmResetAllDesc: This will restore all interface settings to their defaults, including theme, colors, animation, and other preferences. This will not affect your login status. Are you sure?
other.configWizardDesc: Re-run the initial setup wizard to reconfigure system basics.
other.confirmRerunSetupDesc: This will take you back to the initial setup wizard. You can reconfigure the system basics. Are you sure?
other.devToolsDesc: The following features are for development and debugging only. They may cause crashes or abnormal behavior.
other.confirmTriggerErrorDesc: This will manually trigger a React error to test the error boundary component. The page will display an error view; you can recover by refreshing the page or clicking Go Home.
other.exportSuccessDesc: Settings exported as a JSON file
other.importRefreshHintDesc: Some settings require a page refresh to take full effect
other.resetDoneDesc: All settings restored to defaults. Refresh the page to apply changes.

about.author: Author
about.openSourceDesc: This project is open source on GitHub. Give us a Star ⭐!
about.appDesc: A modern Web management interface for MaiBot
about.openSourceThanksDesc: This project uses the following excellent open source libraries. Thank you for your contributions:
about.licenseDesc: This project is licensed under the GNU General Public License v3.0. You are free to use, modify, and distribute the software, provided you keep the same open source license.
about.licenseDeps: All open source libraries used by this project comply with their respective licenses (MIT, Apache-2.0, BSD, etc.). Thank you to all open source contributors for your selfless work.

lib.react: UI library for building user interfaces
lib.streamlineSharp: Sharp icon set designed by Streamline, provided via Iconify, licensed under CC BY 4.0 with attribution retained
lib.streamlineBlock: Block icon set designed by Streamline, provided via Iconify, licensed under CC BY 4.0 with attribution retained

auth.title: Login
auth.description: Enter your access token to continue
auth.accessDesc: Enter your Access Token to continue accessing the system
auth.helpLink: I don't have a Token. Where can I get one?
auth.helpTitle: How to Get an Access Token
auth.helpDesc: Access Token is the only credential to access MaiBot WebUI. Get yours in one of the following ways
auth.method1Desc: When MaiBot starts, the console will display the WebUI Access Token.
auth.method1Example2: 💡 Use this Token to log in to WebUI
auth.method2Desc: The Token is saved in the config file at the project root:
auth.method2FileHint: Open this file and copy the value of the access_token field
auth.securityTip1: Keep your Token safe and never share it with others
auth.securityTip2: To reset the Token, go to System Settings after logging in
auth.verifyFailed: Token verification failed. Please check and try again.
auth.connFailed: Failed to connect to the server. Please check your network connection.

personality.title: Personality
personality.description: Define the bot's personality and speaking style

header.title: Initial Setup Wizard
header.description: Let's complete the initial setup for {{appName}}

validation.enterProviderName: Please enter an API provider name
validation.enterBaseUrl: Please enter the API base URL
validation.enterPlannerModelIdentifier: Please enter the planner model identifier
validation.enterReplyerModelIdentifier: Please enter the replyer model identifier

toast.loadFailedDescription: Unable to load the existing configuration. Default values will be used.
toast.completeSuccessDescription: {{appName}} is restarting to apply the new configuration...
toast.skipFailedTitle: Failed to skip the setup wizard

skipDialog.title: Skip the setup wizard?
skipDialog.description: You can reopen the setup wizard anytime from System Settings. Are you sure you want to skip it?

setupPage.footer: You can change these settings anytime in Settings

personality.personality: She is a sophomore college student who spends time on Tieba.
personality.replyStyle: Keep replies plain and concise, speak Chinese, and avoid deliberately emphasizing any academic background. You can refer to the reply styles commonly seen on Tieba, Zhihu, and Weibo.

multipleReplyStyles.plain: Your style is plain, lightly sarcastic, very short, and colloquial. You can reference Tieba and Weibo reply styles.
multipleReplyStyles.translation: Use a slightly translated tone, but keep it short

emoji.filtrationPrompt: Appropriate and safe for general audiences

platform.label: Platform *
platform.description: Choose the platform where the bot runs

customPlatform.label: Platform Name *
customPlatform.placeholder: Enter a platform name, such as matrix

qqAccount.label: QQ Account *
qqAccount.description: The QQ account used to log in the bot

primaryAccount.label: Account ID *
primaryAccount.description: The bot's account identifier on this platform

alias.label: Aliases
alias.placeholder: Type an alias and press Enter to add it
alias.description: Other names for the bot. You can add multiple aliases.

personality.label: Personality Traits *
personality.placeholder: Describe the bot's personality and identity traits (recommended within 120 characters)
personality.description: Example: a sophomore college girl who browses Tieba

replyStyle.label: Reply Style *
replyStyle.placeholder: Describe how the bot speaks and expresses itself
replyStyle.description: Example: keep replies plain and concise, speak Chinese, and refer to styles seen on Tieba, Zhihu, and Weibo

multipleReplyStyle.label: Alternate Reply Styles
multipleReplyStyle.placeholder: Enter one alternate reply style per line
multipleReplyStyle.description: When this list is not empty, MaiBot may randomly inject one of these styles as a one-time reply hint

multipleProbability.label: Temporary Style Injection Probability
multipleProbability.description: The chance of injecting a one-time alternate style hint each time a reply is built

emojiSendNum.label: Emoji Candidate Count
emojiSendNum.description: How many emojis to choose from before sending. Maximum is 64

maxRegNum.label: Maximum Emoji Count
maxRegNum.description: The maximum number of emojis the bot can store

doReplace.label: Replace When Full
doReplace.description: When enabled, old emojis will be removed; when disabled, new emojis will no longer be collected

checkInterval.label: Check Interval (Minutes)
checkInterval.description: How often to check emoji registration, damage, and deletion

stealEmoji.label: Collect Emojis
stealEmoji.description: Allow the bot to keep certain emojis for itself

contentFiltration.label: Enable Emoji Filtering
contentFiltration.description: Only save emojis that meet the requirements

filtrationPrompt.label: Filter Requirements
filtrationPrompt.placeholder: For example: appropriate and safe for general audiences
filtrationPrompt.description: Describe what kind of emojis should be allowed

allGlobal.label: Enable Global Slang Mode
allGlobal.description: Allow the bot to learn and use group-specific slang

providerName.label: API Provider Name *
providerName.placeholder: For example OpenAI, DeepSeek, or self-hosted
providerName.description: This name is written to model_config.toml and referenced by the models below

baseUrl.label: API Base URL *
baseUrl.description: Enter an OpenAI-compatible endpoint, for example https://api.example.com/v1

apiKey.label: API Key *
apiKey.description: Enter the API key for this provider

identifier.label: planner Model Identifier *
identifier.description: The real model ID provided by the API service; the model name will be initialized from it

identifier.label: replyer Model Identifier *
identifier.description: The real model ID provided by the API service; the model name will be initialized from it

modelSetup.saveHint: You can configure more detailed task assignment later.

restart.checkingTip: ⏳ Waiting for service to recover, do not close this page...
restart.successTip: ✅ Config applied, service is running normally
restart.failedDesc: Service failed to recover within the expected time
restart.failedTip: ⚠️ If unresponsive for a long time, try restarting manually

errorBoundary.title: Something went wrong
errorBoundary.description: The application encountered an unexpected error. You can try refreshing the page or going back home.
errorBoundary.footer: If the problem persists, copy the error info and report it to the developer

search.title: Search
search.startSearch: Type a keyword to start searching

items.promptGeneratorDesc: Generate injectable persona config blocks from text
items.jargonDesc: Manage bot learned slang and jargon
items.behaviorLearningDesc: Browse behavior experience paths and retrieval hits

home.title: Live Monitor
home.subtitle: MaiBot runtime status and statistics overview

descriptions.expressionReview: Open the expression learning review dialog
descriptions.pluginManage: Open the plugin marketplace and management page

dialog.title: Customize Quick Shortcuts
dialog.description: Choose the shortcuts shown on the home quick actions card, including page tabs and plugin configuration pages.

pluginShortcuts.fallbackDescription: Open the specified plugin configuration page
pluginShortcuts.fallbackTabDescription: Open the specified plugin configuration tab

charts.requestTrendDesc: Request volume over the last {{hours}} hours
charts.dailyStatsDesc: Data summary for the last 7 days

home.hitokotoFallback: Life is like a box of chocolates, you never know what you're gonna get.

ariaLabel.requestTrend: Hourly request trend chart showing request count changes over recent hours
ariaLabel.costTrend: API cost trend chart showing API call cost changes over recent hours
ariaLabel.tokenUsage: Token usage trend chart showing token consumption over recent hours
